email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Representative bij Synergie Bornem. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, meertalige medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheer van klantaccounts en de volledige ordercyclus: van opzet tot opvolging en rapportage. Ik communiceer dagelijks in het Engels met klanten en collega's, los vragen op en zorg voor accurate documentatie. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO heeft mij geleerd gestructureerd en probleemoplossend te werken, ook onder tijdsdruk.

Daarnaast spreek ik Turks als moedertaal en ben ik bezig mijn Nederlands (B1) verder te verbeteren. Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en klaar om mij volledig in te zetten voor uw team.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Synergie Bornem. Your call for a customer-oriented, multilingual employee fits my profile perfectly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client accounts and the full order cycle: from setup to follow-up and reporting. I communicate daily in English with customers and colleagues, resolve inquiries, and ensure accurate documentation. My technical background in web design and SEO has taught me to work in a structured, problem-solving manner, even under time pressure.

Additionally, I speak Turkish as my native language and am actively improving my Dutch (B1). I am eager to learn, flexible, and ready to fully commit to your team.

I look forward to discussing my motivation further in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Customer Service Representative bij Synergie Bornem. Uw vacature voor een klantgerichte medewerker die vlot schakelt tussen talen en systemen, spreekt mij enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheer van klantaccounts en de volledige ordercyclus: van nieuwe klantopzet, orderinvoer en -wijzigingen tot escalaties en logistieke opvolging. Ik fungeer als het vaste aanspreekpunt voor klanten en zorg voor tijdige, accurate communicatie en documentatie. Mijn ervaring met CRM-achtige systemen (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics) en mijn gestructureerde aanpak stellen mij in staat om complexe vragen te analyseren en op te lossen binnen de afgesproken serviceniveaus.

Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com geleerd om processen van A tot Z te beheren, prioriteiten te stellen en rapportages op te maken. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO heeft mijn oog voor detail en probleemoplossend vermogen versterkt.

Ik communiceer vloeiend in het Engels (professioneel niveau) en Turks (moedertaal), en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en klaar om mij onder te dompelen in uw orderbeheerprocessen.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Synergie Bornem. Your vacancy for a customer-oriented employee who easily switches between languages and systems appeals to me greatly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing client accounts and the full order cycle: from new customer setup, order entry and modifications to escalations and logistics follow-up. I act as the single point of contact for customers and ensure timely, accurate communication and documentation. My experience with CRM-like systems (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics) and my structured approach enable me to analyze and resolve complex inquiries within agreed service levels.

Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have learned to manage processes end-to-end, set priorities, and prepare reports. My technical background in web design and SEO has strengthened my attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

I communicate fluently in English (professional level) and Turkish (native), and my Dutch is B1 – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I am eager to learn, flexible, and ready to immerse myself in your order management processes.

I look forward to discussing my motivation and skills further in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Full order life cycle management: client account setup, order entry, modifications, escalations, and logistics follow-up (Episto)
• Single point of contact for customers, ensuring accurate documentation and timely communication (Episto)
• Strong English communication skills (professional level) and Dutch B1 (actively improving)
• Structured problem-solving and attention to detail from technical SEO and web design background
• Proactive customer support mindset: resolving inquiries, tracking performance, and driving process improvements
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service · Order Management · Client Support
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on experience in customer account management and the full order life cycle. At Episto, I manage client accounts from setup through order entry, modifications, escalations, and logistics follow-up, acting as the single point of contact for customers. I ensure accurate documentation and timely communication throughout the process. My technical background in web design and SEO has sharpened my attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and ability to work with multiple systems simultaneously. I communicate fluently in English (professional) and Turkish (native), and I am actively improving my Dutch (B1). Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer Order Management: account setup, order entry/modification, escalation handling, logistics coordination, documentation, reporting
- Customer Support: proactive communication, inquiry resolution, relationship building, service level adherence
- Systems & Tools: SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Google Ads, WordPress, Elementor
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Other: structured problem-solving, multitasking, attention to detail, fast learner

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage assigned client accounts: handle new customer setup, order entry, modifications, and escalations to ensure timely delivery
- Act as single point of contact for clients, providing accurate documentation and continuous communication throughout the order cycle
- Resolve complex inquiries through research and understanding of processes, systems, and practices; escalate when needed
- Maintain accurate records of all interactions in appropriate systems
- Prepare and distribute standard and customized reports to clients and internal teams
- Support departmental goals and participate in process improvement initiatives
- Track performance using analytics tools to guide decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site; managed full project life cycle from concept to launch
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve search visibility
- Created and maintained content, ensuring accuracy and timely updates

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
